chinese_news.title: 影石：重新定义性价比
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张帆

坚持做后来者

近日，影石创新发布了登陆资本市场后的首份年报。2025年，公司实现营业收入97.41亿元，同比大幅增长74.76%，创下成立以来的最高营收纪录。然而，同期由于研发、销售等费用高企，公司归母净利润仅为9.29亿元，同比下降了6.62%。

面对这样一份“营收大增、利润下滑”的财报，公司召开了上市后的首次投资者交流会，以回应资本市场的关切。

根据2025年年报显示，报告期内，公司影像业务营收增长了78%，主要得益于销量的大幅提升——2025年实现销量393万台，同比增长76%。另一方面，产品均价相对平稳，约为2169元，同比增长1%。

从ASP趋势来看，公司产品整体呈现下降态势，从2022年的2,391.45元/台连续两年下滑至2024年的2147元，但在2025年实现了企稳。在当前激烈的市场竞争环境下，价格企稳的主要原因，是受益于公司积极拓展B端等高单价客户的提振。

尽管有争议，但不可否认的是，即便面临激烈的价

chinese_news.title: 鲸跃动力获星海图数千万元种子轮投资，用「数据+模型+末端执行」打造开箱即用的Robo Labor丨涌现新项目
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜邱晓芬

一句话介绍

鲸跃动力成立于2026年，以「数据+模型+末端执行」闭环，提供面向场景、可快速部署的Robo Labor（机器人劳动力），让物理劳动力像AWS算力一样，可订阅、可弹性扩容、开箱即用，替代人类从事高危、繁重、脏乱、重复（Deadly/Difficult/Dirty/Duplicate）的物理作业。

融资进展

近日，鲸跃动力已完成由星海图独家领投的数千万元种子轮融资，深渡资本担任独家财务顾问。

本轮融资将用于团队增长、产品的量产交付、专家技能的研发以及数采运营相关工作。

星海图表示：“具身智能的下半场，拼的是‘数据效率×模型泛化×末端执行’的系统能力。鲸跃动力锚定数据主线，专注在真实场景实现快速交付迭代，与我们追求物理世界数据闭环的理念高度一致。团队兼具数据、模型与交付的稀缺基因，

chinese_news.title: 高瓴出手了一家AI体育科技公司，曾获李泽湘天使轮融资｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI体育科技公司SportVision近日已完成天使+轮融资，高瓴创投（GL Ventures）领投，谦恒资本担任独家财务顾问。本轮资金将重点用于核心技术研发、产品量产落地及市场的拓展推广。其新款AI网球训练相机产品计划发售中。

SportVision隶属于深圳思博威视体育科技有限公司‌，长期专注运动算法研发与硬件产品应用、构建AI智能教练体系，此前已获得李泽湘教授旗下清水湾基金的天使轮投资。

过去几年，运动科技赛道几乎被硬件厂商重新定义了一遍。发球机让“一个人练球”成为可能，运动相机令“训练过程的记录”不再需要专人跟拍，智能手表/手环把心率、步频、消耗卡路里等量化成精确的长期数据记录。

尽管每一类产品都跑出了规模不小的公司，但它们各自停留在陪练、记录、监测的单点功能上——数据相互独立、能力无法贯通，难以为用户提供连贯、整体的个性化支持。

运动人群的深层渴望远不止于被记录，还有被指导、被陪伴、被看见进步。一场更底层的变革正在发生：从“记录

贾跃亭又拿到7000万美元投资

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜百度：一季度营收321亿元，AI业务收入136亿元；马斯克预计今年美国将广泛使用自动驾驶汽车；巨力索具旗下十余家企业已注销

大公司：

索辰科技：物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期

36氪获悉，索辰科技公告，公司股票于2026年5月14日至5月18日连续三个交易日内收盘价格涨幅偏离值累计达到30%，属于股票交易异常波动情形。公司近期实施的募投项目“物理合成数据核心技术基座构建与多领域场景示范应用项目”尚处于筹备阶段，若出现募集资金投资项目未能顺利实施、新技术开发进度不达预期、研发遭遇技术瓶颈甚至失败，将会对公司经营业绩造成一定影响。公司物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期。物理AI技术研发投入大、技术迭代快，存在研发进度不及预期、核心技术迭代风险；同时下游行业应用场景拓展、商业化变现存在不确定性，若市场需求、行业政策、技术竞争格局发生不利变化，物理AI业务收入及盈利贡献存在不及预期风险。

chinese_news.title: 番茄小说正推动 AI 动漫上院线，开放头部IP改编权限｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜兰杰 李晓霞

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，据多位接近字节跳动人士消息，字节旗下的番茄小说正在推动AI动漫上院线。在这一过程中，会开放番茄小说平台头部IP的改编权限。

之于番茄小说，如何更好地挖掘平台上好IP的潜力��商业价值，是一个亟待解决的难题。

一方面，以文字形式为载体的IP内容，缺乏统一的视觉形象，使得平台上的IP难以有联名、衍生品等更丰富的变现形式。另一方面，AI漫剧这一新事物迅速发展壮大，其中不乏改编自番茄小说IP的粗制滥造之作。这些内容不但没能延长好IP的生命力，反而形成了一种消耗。此时，通过可登陆院线的影视内容来探索平台IP的更多可能性，不失为一种好的尝试。

另据上述知情人士表示，字节跳动内部为番茄IP定下了影响力的目标，“想让行业内外的人觉得番茄的出品是精品的、正向的。”这一需求落到具体的业务上，上院线会是个不错的答卷。

早在2023年年底，番茄小说就官宣成立了“番茄影视”和“番茄动漫”两大厂牌，推动平台IP的影视化。过去两年间，番茄影视先后与腾讯视频

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 性能极限与跨界尝试：红魔11S Pro系列深度体验
chinese_news.summary:
在智能手机行业普遍面临镜头模组日益凸出、机身内部堆叠空间受限的背景下，电竞旗舰由于其对散热和功耗的极端要求，往往表现出更为激进的工业设计。作为新一代的性能导向型产品，红魔11S Pro系列通过软硬件的垂直堆叠，试图在移动终端上探索更进一步的性能上限。以下我们将从设计、理论性能释放、以及实际软硬件体验三个维度，对其进行深度拆解。

&nbsp;

一、 外观设计：纯平后盖的内部堆叠与电竞美学

从视觉和握持逻辑来看，红魔11S Pro最显著的特征在于其坚守的纯平后盖设计。在行业因大底传感器而集体妥协于镜头凸出的趋势下，这种“反向”设计在工业制造上面临着极高的空间挑战。

chinese_news.title: Agent、多模态、应用、算力一天看尽，峰会亮点在此｜5.20日，来现场一起AI
chinese_news.summary:
进入2026，AI愈发狂飙突进。围观体验之余，人人不免在心中自问：

朋友圈刷屏的“龙虾”、Harness等AI新事物，跟我到底有什么关系？真的有必要跟吗？

AI创业、AI融资如火如荼，属于我的机会又在哪里？

别人已经在用AI做视频、写代码、跑项目，我是不是已经慢了一拍？

……

到最后，几乎所有问题都会汇成同一个问题：我，到底该如何用AI？

如果你对这些问题还很模糊，不妨来第四届中国AIGC产业峰会走一趟——一天时间，把这一年AI产业最值得关注的人、事、判断，一次性讲清楚。

先提前剧透一波。

18位重磅嘉宾，1场Agent主题圆桌，1份年度榜单，1张全景图谱——所有内容都已敲定。 

阵容上，既有昆仑万维、智谱、商汤、百度、蚂蚁、MiniMax这样的行业头部，也有亚马逊云科技、硅谷Fusion Fund带来的全球视角；既有复旦邱锡鹏、港大黄超代表的

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 USD on June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC shed $5K in days amid ETF outflows and derivatives pressure; geopolitical Iran tensions (Trump call-off) and Treasury bond volatility create directional uncertainty ahead of Q2 close.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk ETF flow analysis; CNBC Treasury sell-off coverage; BBC Trump Iran negotiations

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed hold rates steady at June 2026 FOMC meeting (no cut, no hike)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: U.S. Treasury 30-year yields hit highest since 1999; renewed inflation fears dominating bond markets; Powell's next statement will signal whether Fed pivots or holds hawkish stance.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Treasury sell-off analysis; global bond market monitoring

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $3,200 USD on July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Ethereum Foundation seeing high-profile departures amid internal shakeup; institutional inflows (Bitmine buying 71K ETH on dips) suggest accumulation despite leadership churn; AI infrastructure demand remains core thesis.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph Ethereum Foundation departures; CoinDesk institutional positioning

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the SEC approve a tokenized stock trading framework by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports SEC plans to propose framework with 'innovation exemption'; Wall Street efforts deepening; regulatory clarity on tokenization could unlock trillion-dollar TAM.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk SEC tokenized stock framework; Bloomberg reporting

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Elon Musk successfully appeal his OpenAI lawsuit verdict by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Oakland jury ruled against Musk on 'technicality'; Musk vows to appeal; outcome affects narrative on Musk-Altman split and shapes future AI governance precedent.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Musk appeal announcement; Oakland court filing

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump administration launch a military strike on Iran (beyond ongoing tensions) by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Department of Defense official statement or UN Security Council emergency session announcement; major news wire confirmation (Reuters, AP, BBC)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Markets currently pricing 'pause' as de-escalation; but Trump's pattern of unpredictability and Gulf state pressure dynamics suggest binary risk not yet fully reflected in geopolitical derivative pricing.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC reports Trump called off planned Tuesday attack; but 'serious negotiations' language is ambiguous and reversible. Gulf states' role in restraint is leverage-dependent.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin volatility (30-day realized) exceed 60% annualized on any single calendar day between now and August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Glassnode volatility metric or Coin Metrics 30-day historical volatility dataset; publicly downloadable CSV
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current crypto vol regime underestimating tail risk from: (1) Treasury yield shock feedback loops, (2) Iran escalation geopolitical premium, (3) ETF redemption cascades. Most traders anchored to 2024 vol baseline.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports $5K BTC drop in days + derivatives liquidation warnings; Treasury bonds at 25-year highs; no circuit breaker momentum yet priced

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. House pass a permanent CBDC ban by October 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. House Clerk official vote tally; Congress.gov bill status; press release from House Banking Committee
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Republican momentum evident (Cointelegraph reports lawmakers calling for ban as vote approaches); crypto community underestimating legislative urgency; permanent ban != temporary prohibition—meaningful escalation.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph headlines on Republican push; House vote scheduled imminently; broader anti-Fed-digital-money sentiment among GOP base

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana's ecosystem TVL exceed Ethereum's on any date between now and December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DefiLlama TVL rankings (Solana vs. Ethereum chain-wide); screenshot-certified or API-logged timestamp
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk narrative: 'Solana shedding memecoin reputation as big banks move billions in'; institutional flows underappreciated; but Ethereum's moat still deep. Market assigns <10% probability but cultural/infrastructure shift evident.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports on big-bank billions moving to Solana; SOL ecosystem growth outpacing ETH; Hyperliquid's USDC deal signals institutional confidence in Solana rails

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's valuation reach or exceed $200 billion in a funding round or secondary market sale by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Crunchbase Series funding announcement; Pitchbook transaction; Wall Street Journal or Bloomberg official reporting on round terms
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Musk lawsuit noise creates optionality anchor; but AI investor enthusiasm (tech earnings loved this season per CNBC) suggests runway for massive valuation jump. Anthropic acquisition of Stainless (HN #1 story) signals M&A consolidation and higher AI bar.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Anthropic acquires Stainless; OpenAI strategic momentum in enterprise (136B yuan AI revenue at Baidu Q1 2026 signals market size); Musk appeal resolution clears narrative overhang

investment_theses.thesis: Long USD (DXY) and short long-dated U.S. Treasury bonds (TLT) into year-end 2026 as Fed holds rates steady while inflation expectations remain sticky.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Treasury 30-year yields hit highest since 1999; global bond markets on edge
CNBC: Traders monitoring central bank responses to renewed inflation fears
Cointelegraph: 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025 (highest since 2022)—inflation hedge appetite evident
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed could surprise with rate cut if labor market weakens faster than consensus; Treasury sell-off could reverse on flight-to-safety if Iran escalates into full conflict.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (short 3x leveraged via UUP or currency futures); short TLT (20+ year Treasury ETF) or long TBT (inverse 20-year Treasury); implement via calendar spreads in CBOT Treasury futures (ZB, TN contracts)

investment_theses.thesis: Short Ethereum relative to Bitcoin (long BTC, short ETH or long BTC/ETH ratio) through Q3 2026 as Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus creates near-term execution risk despite strong institutional AI demand.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Ethereum Foundation high-profile departures; internal shakeup deepens
CoinDesk: Bitcoin ETF flows stabilizing while Ethereum demand diverges; derivatives positioning asymmetric
36Kr (FLAG: Chinese source, early signal): Solana ecosystem scaling with institutional backing; cultural narrative shift away from Ethereum-centric L1 assumption
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum's Shanghai/Dencun upgrades and staking yield (5–6% APR) could drive strong Q3 rebound; AI narrative benefits both chains equally.
investment_theses.expression: Spot long BTC / spot short ETH (1:1 notional ratio); or use Deribit long BTC call + short ETH call with 3-month horizon; or Bybit/Hyperliquid BTC/ETH perps ratio trade (long BTC, short ETH, 5–10x leverage)

investment_theses.thesis: Long AI-chip supply-constrained narrative (long NVDA, MU) hedged against Iran geopolitical premium bleed via long-dated VIX calls through June 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Tech investors loved earnings season; chip sector scrambling to shore up key materials access as costs rise due to Iran tensions
CNBC: Iran war piling pressure on companies powering AI boom
36Kr: Baidu Q1 2026 AI revenue 136B yuan (33% of total)—institutional AI capex cycle persists despite geopolitical noise
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran escalation could crater risk appetite entirely, dragging semis down 15–20% alongside broad equity sell-off; supply-chain optimization could ease pressure faster than priced.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA (or SMH semiconductor ETF) + long VIX Jun-2026 call spreads (buy 20 call, sell 30 call) to hedge tail risk; maintain 70/30 weighting (long semis / long vol hedge); or use broad tech sector rotation into defensive names (XLK) if geopolitical stress peaks

investment_theses.thesis: Long crypto adoption narrative in emerging markets (Solana ecosystem, Hyperliquid, stablecoins) via exposure to HYPE, RON, ONDO tokens, but with strict position sizing against CBDC regulatory headwinds.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Hyperliquid USDC deal could supercharge HYPE; Revolut pushing Dogecoin mainstream via physical card; Solana attracting billions in institutional capital
Cointelegraph: 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025 (adoption peak); Republican CBDC ban momentum suggests retail tailwinds
36Kr: Chinese institutional interest in Solana; AI trading bots on Hyperliquid gaining traction
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown (CBDC ban passage, SEC tokenization framework delays, or operational security breaches like Echo Protocol's $77M exploit) could crater sentiment; altcoin beta risk is asymmetric.
investment_theses.expression: Long HYPE (Hyperliquid token) at 30% position weight; long RON (Ronin ecosystem token) at 20%; long ONDO (structured yield product, less volatile) at 20%; hedge with short BTC perps (10% notional) or long stablecoin yield (USDC 4–5% APR via Compound/Lido) as ballast

investment_theses.thesis: Short U.S. equities (SPY) into early June 2026 on twin headwinds: (1) geopolitical Iran risk still under-priced, (2) Treasury bond volatility spillover into duration-heavy mega-cap valuations.
supporting_signals: BBC: Trump called off planned Iran attack but 'serious negotiations' language offers limited durability; Gulf state pressure could reverse
CNBC: Treasury 30-year yields highest since 1999; equities have not yet repriced earnings for higher discount rates
36Kr: China-Russia summit (Putin to Beijing) signals geopolitical realignment; U.S. asset sell-off risk if Washington faces two-front pressure
investment_theses.counter_view: Tech mega-cap earnings remain strong (AI capex cycle intact); Fed likely to cut once inflation subsides; equity volatility has room to compress if Iran tensions truly ease.
investment_theses.expression: Short SPY (QQQ if tilting toward tech sensitivity) via put spreads (sell Jun 30 550 put, buy Jun 30 530 put); or use inverse leveraged ETF (PSQ, 3x NASDAQ inverse) for 5–10% tactical position sizing; maintain strict stop at +3% SPY; rotate to long BTC as hedge if SPY confirms bounce off support
